title: Washing Machine
body:
# Washing Machines!
![Washing: Machine Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c3118f0ec7e3a50c5f7778edf14e342d4794e85.png)

This mod adds a washing machine to Minecraft. And some laundry detergent.

## How to use

To use the Washing Machine, craft it using Cobblestone, Stone, and a bucket of water.
Then, around your world, you can find lakes or deltas of Laundry Detergent that you can fill a bucket with and put in the Washing Machine.
Using the detergent, you can clean leather armor and banners.
You can also craft laundry detergent using a bucket of water along with a vibrant dye and a sticky or smooth substance.

_**Yup.**_

## Credits
